nodes.documentation: @title Minimal interface to interact with the existing ZombieOwnership ERC721 contract
nodes.name: ZombieOwnershipInterface
ZombieMarketplace

nodes.documentation: @dev Owner can update the underlying ZombieOwnership contract address if needed.
nodes.name: setZombieContract

nodes.documentation:
@dev List a zombie for sale. Caller must be the current owner and must have
     approved this marketplace contract to transfer the token.
nodes.name: listZombie

nodes.documentation: @dev Cancel an existing listing and return the zombie to the seller.
nodes.name: cancelListing

nodes.documentation: @dev Buy a listed zombie by paying the exact asking price in ETH.
nodes.name: buyZombie
